approvalSource: Steve approved FOUNDATION-KB-ACTION-REVIEW-SPRINT-001 and instructed the builder to continue with ACTION-ROUTE-REVIEW-INBOX-001 after FOUNDATION-KB-COMPILER-V1-001 shipped, with no live extraction, transcript fetches, screenshots, model calls, auth-required or paid runs, external writes, or Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work.
scopeSummary: Build a read-only Action Route Review Inbox so proposed action-route findings are separated from normal Backlog cards while preserving source proof and focused-card access.
constraints: No transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, or model call.
No action-route apply/promote/reject/snooze mutation in this card.
